questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: A is three times as old as B, and the sum of their ages is $48$ years. A's age is _____ years.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Express both ages in one variable.

**Working.** $A=3B$ and $A+B=48\Rightarrow 4B=48\Rightarrow B=12,\;A=36$.

**Answer.** $36$ years.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.topic: Quantitative Aptitude ŌĆö Time and Work
questions.stem: A can finish a job in $12$ days and B in $6$ days. Working together, they finish it in _____ days.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Add the per-day work rates.

**Working.** $\dfrac{1}{12}+\dfrac{1}{6}=\dfrac{1}{12}+\dfrac{2}{12}=\dfrac{3}{12}=\dfrac{1}{4}$, so $4$ days.

**Answer.** $4$ days.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: Select the word most similar in meaning to 'ABATE'.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** 'Abate' means to become less intense or to reduce.

**Working.** Among the options, 'diminish' is the closest synonym; 'increase' is its antonym.

**Answer.** diminish.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.topic: Quantitative Aptitude ŌĆö CI vs SI Difference
questions.stem: The difference between the compound interest and the simple interest on $10000$ at $10\%$ per annum for $2$ years is _____ .

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: On a standard die, opposite faces sum to $7$. If the top face shows $2$, the bottom face shows

figure.caption: A die with two pips showing on its top face.
figure.markup: <svg viewBox='0 0 120 120' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' role='img'><rect x='25' y='25' width='70' height='70' rx='8' fill='rgba(99,102,241,0.08)' stroke='#334155' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='45' cy='45' r='6' fill='#334155'/><circle cx='75' cy='75' r='6' fill='#334155'/></svg>

questions.solution:
**Concept.** Opposite faces of a standard die add to $7$.

**Working.** $7-2=5$.

**Answer.** $5$.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.topic: Quantitative Aptitude ŌĆö Time, Speed and Distance
questions.stem: Two trains $60$ km apart move toward each other at $40$ km/h and $20$ km/h. The time taken to meet is _____ hours.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Closing speed = sum of speeds when moving toward each other.

**Working.** Relative speed $=40+20=60$ km/h; time $=\dfrac{60}{60}=1$ h.

**Answer.** $1$ hour.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: In a group of $50$ people, $30$ like tea, $25$ like coffee and $10$ like both. The number who like neither is _____ .
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Inclusion-exclusion, then subtract from the total.

**Working.** Tea or coffee $=30+25-10=45$; neither $=50-45=5$.

**Answer.** $5$.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: THERMOMETER : TEMPERATURE :: BAROMETER : ?
questions.solution:
**Concept.** The relationship is 'instrument : quantity it measures'.

**Working.** A thermometer measures temperature; a barometer measures atmospheric pressure.

**Answer.** pressure.

questions.stem: Rock Quality Designation (RQD) is computed from drill core as the percentage of
options: intact pieces Ōēź10 cm summed over the run length
questions.solution:
**Concept.** RQD = ╬Ż(intact pieces Ōēź10 cm) / total core run ├Ś 100.

**Working.**
Pieces Ōēź10 cm.

**Answer.** ╬Ż pieces Ōēź10 cm

questions.subject: Metamorphic Petrology
questions.stem: In Barrovian metamorphism, the index mineral marking the highest grade among these is
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Barrovian zones: chlorite ŌåÆ biotite ŌåÆ garnet ŌåÆ staurolite ŌåÆ kyanite ŌåÆ sillimanite.

**Working.**
Sillimanite.

**Answer.** Sillimanite

questions.stem: In a GIS, a continuously varying surface such as elevation is best stored as a
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Continuous fields (DEMs) are efficiently stored as rasters.

**Working.**
Raster.

**Answer.** Raster

questions.subject: Stratigraphy & Indian Geology
questions.stem: A system spans from $485\,$Ma (base) to $201\,$Ma (top). Its duration is _____ Myr.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Duration = base age ŌłÆ top age.

**Working.**
$$485-201=284.$$

**Answer.** $284\,$Myr

questions.subject: Structural Geology
questions.stem: A reverse fault forms under a stress regime in which
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Andersonian theory: reverse (thrust) faulting has horizontal $\sigma_1$, vertical $\sigma_3$.

**Working.**
Horizontal $\sigma_1$.

**Answer.** $\sigma_1$ horizontal

questions.subject: Structural Geology
questions.stem: A planar fault strikes $120^\circ$ and dips $45^\circ$. The plunge of the true-dip line (steepest line on the plane) is _____ degrees.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** The true-dip line plunges at the dip angle, in the dip direction.

**Working.**
$$\text{plunge}=\text{dip}=45^\circ.$$

**Answer.** $45^\circ$
